_note: cccc project config — https://github.com/devdashco/claudectl. banner shows the repo name above the tabs (banner.name/color/subtitle; banner.enabled=false hides it). issue_template forces the shape of new issues (n): pick a type, a 'type: summary' title, a priority, and a body of the listed sections — required ones can't be blank. issue_template.enabled=false → free-form AI drafter.
